# perf-real-world: HTTP server with multiple PERF rule violations
lang: go
file: http_server-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package server

import (
	"net/http"
	"strings"
)

func handleGet(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	page := r.URL.Query().Get("page")
	size := r.URL.Query().Get("size")
	sort := r.URL.Query().Get("sort")

	name := strings.Replace(r.URL.Path, "/", "", -1)
	w.Write([]byte("page=" + page + " size=" + size + " sort=" + sort + " name=" + name))
}

// Serve returns an *http.Server without ReadTimeout or WriteTimeout.
func Serve(handler http.Handler) *http.Server {
	return &http.Server{
		Addr:    ":8080",
		Handler: handler,
	}
}
